stopConditions: Any candidate, fixture, engine-contract, or manifest change after this review invalidates this digest-bound evidence and requires a new independent review run.
Any later reviewer disagreement or editorial rejection blocks publication of the whole immutable batch.
notes: Independent mechanical review passed at exact HEAD d8ea082. All 488 frozen fixtures and 180 separate fresh probes produced the expected binary grammar-only outcomes. Fresh probes covered exact section placement; direct links and inline code; divider and blockquote order; ordered, unordered, short, and misplaced lists; exact H3 stage anatomy; and fenced, untagged, nested, tilde, and empty language-tagged code. The current engine intentionally grades Markdown anatomy rather than prose truth and accepts an empty language-tagged fenced block; this review verified that documented current-semantics boundary rather than claiming command execution or semantic validation. No candidate collided with the 236 published problems by id, target, or level-family-content variant.
